params.propertyId: The ID of the property to book.

params.cusd: The address of the cUSD ERC-20 token on Celo.

params.nightlyPrice: The price per night in the specified asset (18 decimals).
params.paymentAsset: The asset for payments (0 for CELO, 1 for CUSD).
params.title: The title of the property.

book(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Books a property for a date range and handles payment.

constructor.notice: Constructor to initialize the contract with cUSD token address.

getBooking(uint256).notice: Gets the details of a booking.

getNextBookingId().notice: Gets the next booking ID to be assigned.

getNextPropertyId().notice: Gets the next property ID to be assigned.

getProperty(uint256).notice: Gets the details of a property.

getPropertyBookings(uint256).notice: Gets the list of booking IDs for a property.

isDateRangeAvailable(uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Checks if a date range is available for booking on a property.

setPropertyActive(uint256,bool).notice: Sets the active status of a property (host only).
